query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `13_mecanico_feedback` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `mecanicoId` INT NOT NULL,
  `tipo` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  `comentario` TEXT,
  `dataFeedback` DATE NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
